key.name: enable-face-authentication
key.description: Controls whether face authentication is attempted by the Gaze GNOME extension for the current dconf profile.

key.name: max-face-tries
key.description: Number of failed face attempts before face auth is stopped for the current authentication cycle.

key.name: face-retry-mode
key.description: Whether face authentication retries are disabled, limited to a fixed number, or infinite.
